user.title: Set up Sonoff BMT01 BBQ Thermometer
user.description:
Enter the Bluetooth MAC address and the DEVICE_KEY (UUID) from the eWeLink app.

**First-time pairing:** Hold the device button for **7 seconds** until the LED flashes — then click Submit. The BLE bond is saved by your OS; subsequent connections are automatic.

error.invalid_device_key: Invalid device key — must be a UUID (xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx)

init.title: BMT01 Settings
init.description:
Update the MAC address or device key.

**Note:** Changing the MAC address will generate a new pairing identity. Hold the button for 7 seconds on the next connection.

error.invalid_device_key: Invalid device key — must be a UUID (xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx)
